positive: A synthwave-style illustration featuring a chrome sports car driving towards a neon sunset over a grid landscape. Palm trees silhouetted against magenta and cyan gradients. Retro 80s aesthetic, vaporwave, glitch art, vibrant glow, vaporwave poster art.
